description:
Extract Demographics, Allergies, Active Conditions, and the most recent Vitals for the patient specified in '/tmp/task_patient_info.txt'. Create a summary file at '~/patient_summary.txt' using the exact format below. If a section is empty, write 'None recorded'.

PATIENT CHART SUMMARY
=====================
Full Name: <given_name> <family_name>
Date of Birth: <YYYY-MM-DD>

ALLERGIES:
- <allergen_name> (Severity: <severity>)

CONDITIONS:
- <condition_name>

VITALS (Most Recent):
- Systolic BP: <value> mmHg
- Diastolic BP: <value> mmHg
- Weight: <value>
